data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. CHOJI AKIMICHI turned in a fair run last time from an unfavourable draw finishing fourth by 2.5 lengths (19.59). Form here at the trip sound including 11 wins. Better than the latest effort and deserves another chance. 2. NEED YOU NOW has missed the frame at his last two but did run well three back when third (29.17) in a Grade 5 at Sale. Expected to bounce back to best. 8. TROPIC MAN is a talented type and proved too classy last time to win by a neck at this track in a handy 19.78 beating Wild Venus. Looks a key chance if runs up to latest figure. 1. ALLIE showed plenty of dash to record a last start win. Must be respected.","runners":[4,2,8,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: HEALESVILLE-R6-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
